# Life Time Technology Store

Official domain: https://lifetimetechnology.store
Primary region: Kenya
Primary currency: KES

## Storefront Scope
- Premium electronics and jewelry catalogue
- Product discovery by category, brand, price, and search
- Assisted checkout and WhatsApp support

## Main Categories
- Electronics: smartphones, laptops, watches, audio, tablets, kitchen-accessories, gaming, smart-home
- Jewelry: jewerlys, jewelry-necklaces, jewelry-rings, jewelry-bracelets, jewelry-earrings, jewelry-watches

## URL Patterns
- Homepage: https://lifetimetechnology.store/
- Category view: https://lifetimetechnology.store/?category={category-slug}
- Search view: https://lifetimetechnology.store/?category={category-slug}&q={query}
- Product detail (SPA state): https://lifetimetechnology.store/?category={category-slug}&product={product-slug}

## Product Fields
- name
- brand
- category
- price
- original_price
- stock
- description
- specs (key-value)
- variants
- images
- highlights

## Admin
- Catalog management for electronics and jewelry scopes
- Product image URL support with normalization
- Banner and category image controls
